parityMeta.describes: PA-S2 engineUtils enrichExercise/buildExerciseMetadata OUTPUT parity over the EMPTY override/equivalence seam. Eight representative ExerciseTemplate inputs with SYNTHETIC ids (asserted absent from EXERCISE_KNOWLEDGE_OVERRIDES and EXERCISE_EQUIVALENCE_CHAINS) so the real TS engine runs only the default-derivation branches this slice ports — the override DATA tables are PA-S3. Cases cover: compound (kind compound + kind machine) vs isolation; bigMuscle (胸/背/腿) vs not; the progressionUnitKg ||-chain (bigMuscle->2.5, startWeight>=40->2.5, isolation-small->1, parsed-string '0.5kg'->0.5, explicit progressionUnitKg->5); the techniqueStandard default rom branch (compound->完整可控幅度 / isolation->受控完整幅度) plus an exercise.techniqueStandard overlay (tempo + extra key); the alternativeIds/alternativePriorities exercise fallback; and a non-schema open-bag key (customTag) round-tripping through enrichExercise's spread. FUNCTION-LEVEL compute-assert: the Swift EngineUtils.enrichExercise/buildExerciseMetadata re-run on each echoed exercise and reconcile metadata + enriched field-by-field.
parityMeta.sourceNotes: No clock — enrichExercise/buildExerciseMetadata carry no wall clock. override = {} and equivalence = undefined because every id is synthetic (absent from both knowledge tables); the generator throws if any id collides with the real tables, guaranteeing the golden pins the empty-seam default branches only.

cases.label: compound + bigMuscle(腿) default — progressionUnitKg 2.5 via bigMuscle
isolation + small muscle(手臂) + startWeight<40 — progressionUnitKg 1, rom 受控完整幅度
alternativeIds/alternativePriorities exercise fallback + open-bag customTag round-trip
isolation + small muscle(肩) + startWeight>=40 — progressionUnitKg 2.5 via startWeight
